Sebastian Raschka 做的一个 LLM 架构图鉴

把当前主流开源 LLM 的架构用统一的图表格式画出来，做成一个可视化图鉴，方便横向对比。

每个模型的卡片包含：架构图、参数规模、发布日期、解码器类型（Dense/MoE/Hybrid）、注意力机制类型（GQA/MLA/MHA 等）、关键设计特点，还链接了 HuggingFace 的

无药可救 

他用ChatGPT造了一支癌症疫苗
救活了自己的狗狗

悉尼有个程序员叫 Paul Conyngham，2019 年从收容所领养了一只狗，斯塔福郡梗和沙皮的混血，之前在灌木丛里被人发现，没人知道她经历过什么。Paul 把她带回家，取名 Rosie。

接下来五年，Rosie https://t.co/zaVEJkdZi8

太长了 

完整内容：https://t.co/SgIaSpIOiu https://t.co/CzEMDKXjNK

AI agent 操作网页一直有个根本性的问题：它得像人一样"看"页面，截图识别按钮，猜输入框该填什么格式，猜提交逻辑是什么。慢，还费 token...

Google 在 Chrome 146 里推了 WebMCP，思路完全反过来。让网站主动把自己的能力以结构化工具的形式暴露出来，AI agent 直接调用，拿到结构化结果。 https://t.co/bPEYNFL5CM

chrome://flags/#enable-webmcp-testing 开启 flag

然后安装 Model Context Tool Inspector 扩展

在线试玩看看：https://t.co/PMXRPOa2nr

你可以在上面用 AI agent 通过结构化工具调用来"做披萨"（选配料、下单等），而不是让 agent 去猜页面上的按钮在哪。

太猛了，朋友们！Codepilot 上周数据如下：

1. 总共 10 万行代码提交
2. 73 次 Commit
3. 一周 8 个版本
4. 近两周 PV 达到了 5 万次
5. Github Star 3900 https://t.co/t5IuciIYVL
欢迎 Star：https://t.co/McdCJKTIJ1

重点是这个项目只有藏师傅一个人。

我去，那在年前很难想象我能够有一周十万行代码的能力，而且这个速度还在提升，bug 的几率还在下降。

而且我这样，都没有把 Max 会员 200 美元的额度用完。

很难想象那些一个月跑十几亿 token 的朋友咋用

过去 30 天 Token 消耗总量为 1.4 亿

其中春节几天几乎没有工作 https://t.co/dGy7VJB7c3
统计工具用的：https://t.co/HZQYkLeEiD

FYI
https://t.co/Bre4dRG9Gz

Hey Excel agents from Claude, OpenAI & MS Copilot: "make me a working strategy game in excel, it should have some form of graphics"

Claude made a board and acted as game master, Copilot created a board but no game, ChatGPT built a working game with formulas with a "smart" enemy. https://t.co/IMw1lqwu7Y

Gave Claude two more tries, telling it it had to make the game entirely in Excel worksheets. The second one, it also made itself the game master/engine. When I called it out, it created another design that didn't work. https://t.co/L6MemOGIFl

The best Brutalist/Brutalist-inspired architecture of the 1960s through 1980s still looks more like the future than almost anything built before or since.

The atriums of  the Hyatt Regency San Francisco (1973), Hyatt Regency Atlanta (1967), Atlanta Marriott Marquis (1985). https://t.co/ohs0sAGXET

Since AI is a general purpose technology touching every aspect of work & society, a lot of the fact checking on AI advances has to come from experts in fields outside of AI

I can only listen to them about the dog cancer story, the fruit fly brain download, or math breakthroughs.

For what it is worth: the expert consensus seems to be that the dog cancer story & fruit fly brain are in the "cool elements with important caveats to the story" category, while AI math abilities are getting to the level of doing real, but not very important, work, and gaining.

Had a health scare last week and I’m just getting back on my feet 😅

Apologies for all the missed meetings / events / emails / DMs.

And PSA - if anything weird is going health-wise, run all your symptoms + meds through your LLM of choice (in addition to seeing a human doctor!)
